tools.name: acoustic_fembem_double_layer_low_frequency_sweep_gate
tools.title: Double-Layer Low-Frequency Sweep Gate
tools.description: Validates shared-session GYP-052..054 evidence for the source-normal Helmholtz double-layer split, including O((k*r)^2) correction scaling, source-normal orientation, low-kr coverage, and an independent public gate.

summary_json.description: Compact JSON summary of an already executed shared-session sweep.
